scripts.build: npm run build --workspace catalog && npm run build --workspace blog && npm run build --workspace kiosk && npm run build --workspace danro && npm run build --workspace preview && npm run build --workspace museum && npm run postbuild
scripts.postbuild: printf 'preview\n' > dist/.assetsignore && cp -Rn dist/preview/client/_astro/* dist/blog/_astro/ || true
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy --workspace worker
scripts.//deploy: One Worker, one ../dist bundle. wrangler diffs assets by hash, so a per-site deploy rebuilds only that site and uploads only its changed files; the sibling sites' dist is left as-is and stays live. The Worker script (index.js) is shared and redeploys every time. postbuild guarantees dist/.assetsignore. First deploy after a clean checkout must be the full `deploy` (the Worker imports dist/preview/server).
scripts.deploy:catalog: npm run build --workspace catalog && npm run postbuild && npm run deploy --workspace worker
scripts.deploy:blog: npm run build --workspace blog && npm run build --workspace preview && npm run postbuild && npm run deploy --workspace worker
scripts.deploy:kiosk: npm run build --workspace kiosk && npm run postbuild && npm run deploy --workspace worker
scripts.deploy:museum: npm run build --workspace museum && npm run postbuild && npm run deploy --workspace worker
